aligned_lyrics.text: Sleeves pulled down past my hands
So we keep taking the long way home
We keep taking the long way home
If this road just never ends
I’m not ready for the night to end
Your name swimming in my texts
Words come out all soft and crooked
Mouth too tired to say “what’s next”
So we keep taking the long way home
We keep taking the long way home
If this road just never ends
I’m not ready for the night to end
So we keep taking the long way home
We keep taking the long way home
If this road just never ends
I’m not ready for the night to end
I’m not ready for the night to end
